title: cornus australis var. koenigii
intro: Cornus australis var. koenigii, also known as the Koenig's dogwood, is a plant species that belongs to the Cornaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cornus australis var. koenigii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine.
